══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Hobgoblin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hobgoblin — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hobgoblin — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Hobgoblin — Iron Concentration HP: 58/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Hobgoblin — Iron Concentration HP: 36/67
